sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a lingering issue with their knee surgery, experiencing pain in the left hand and reports issues with their joints. He also reports lack of sleep and insomnia. The patient reports a stressful summer.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with chronic pain and possible stress-related insomnia.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a refill on fosamax. Continue the patient on fosamax.
